project_type: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite SPA (CareVista care home management)
verification_instructions: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/frontend && npm run build` to verify TypeScript compilation and Vite build succeed
environment_constraints: Open internet - can install packages. No test suite exists.
contribution_requirements: All styling is custom CSS in frontend/src/index.css + inline styles in components. No CSS frameworks.
key_patterns:
- Global CSS with media queries in index.css (breakpoints: <640px phone, 640-1023px tablet, >=1024px desktop)
- Components use inline styles extensively with fixed pixel widths and grid layouts
- App.tsx already has sidebar drawer, bottom nav, top bar for mobile
- CSS utility classes: grid-2, grid-3, grid-4, grid-auto, hidden-mobile, hidden-tablet, show-mobile-only
- Modals already go full-screen on phone
- Tables already have horizontal scroll wrappers
- Login page uses two-column flexbox split with percentage widths (no mobile override)
- Dashboard pages use inline gridTemplateColumns with fixed column counts (no responsive behavior)
- Buttons have min-height: 38px (need 44px on mobile)
- Form inputs have min-height: 40px (need 44px on mobile)
directory_structure:
frontend/src/index.css - global styles
frontend/src/App.tsx - main layout with sidebar/bottom-nav/router
frontend/src/pages/ - 58+ page components
frontend/src/pages/dashboards/ - 7 role-based dashboards
frontend/src/components/ - shared components
frontend/src/hooks/ - custom hooks
frontend/src/store/ - Zustand stores
frontend/src/services/ - API layer
frontend/src/types/ - TypeScript types
